message.content:
Thoroughly explore the project at /Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms-last-attempt to identify:

1. ALL directories and key files
2. UX research documents, design files, mockups
3. Any useful patterns, components, or code that could be transferred
4. Documentation about design decisions
5. Any design system or style guide references

This is a reference project that may have useful UX research. Extract all valuable insights.

Do NOT make any changes - this is research only.
